name: llm-rag-wiki
description: Local-first wiki + RAG + persona micro-app over the K1 bridge.

tools.name: rag.retrieve
tools.description: Read-only RAG retrieval over the local wiki index.

tools.name: persona.list
tools.description: List available persona IDs (no rule text).

tools.name: persona.compile
tools.description: Compose an ad-hoc persona profile (ephemeral; not persisted).

kv.purpose: Last query string and UI preferences. Never pipeline data (ADR-0003 §4).
